data.title: Cruise Stocks Drop Amid U.S. Tax Crackdown Concerns: What's Going On?
data.description: Cruise stocks such as Carnival Corporation (NYSE: CCL), Royal Caribbean Inc. (NYSE: RCL) and Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE: NCLH) are trading lower Thursday after Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick suggested in an interview that those companies will have to start paying U.S. taxes.

data.title: EPAM Systems Shares Drop After Weak 2025 Guidance, Q1 EPS Forecast Miss
data.description: EPAM Systems Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) are trading lower Thursday following the company's fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 earnings report and its disappointing 2025 guidance.

data.title: Block Shares Sink After Q4 Revenue Miss, CEO Jack Dorsey Expects To End Year 'At Rule Of 40 Run Rate'
data.description: Block reported its fourth-quarter results after Thursday's closing bell. Here's a look at the key figures from the quarter.

data.title: Booking Holdings Q4 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Dividend Increase, Shares Move Higher
data.description: Booking Holdings reported fourth-quarter revenue of $5.47 billion, beating analyst estimates of $5.18 billion. The online travel agency company reported fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $41.55 per share, beating analyst estimates of $35.89 per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: FTAI Aviation Shares Surge After Resolving Short Seller Allegations
data.description: FTAI Aviation shares are trading higher Thursday following a major announcement that addressed recent short seller reports.
